title: Reboot LovelyRobot
description:
The LovelyRobot mod has been revived and updated with new robot companions, featuring cute robot designs that players can customize.

These robot companions can assist players in battles and provide various offensive and defensive capabilities.
body:
📖 About

Hello hello...
New update is here, and this one took a bit off me but hey it's finally here, with new robots yey!! I corrected a couple things but there are others still a bit stubborn, with time I will learn how to make them go, for now enjoy.

The mod is now finally playable, so have fun, I hope you enjoy the revival of this lovely mod.

✨Interactions

Chat Notification - Toggle chat level up notification on/off by left-clicking the robot with an oak button.

Status Display - View the robot's status summary by left-clicking with a book.

Enchantments - See the robot's enchantment levels by left-clicking with a book and quill.

Guard Mode - Set the robot to guard its current location by left-clicking with a compass.

Auto Attack - Toggle auto attack mode on/off by left-clicking with any sword.

Standby - Set the robot to standby/passive mode by left-clicking with an empty hand.

Colour Customization - Change the robot's colour by left-clicking with any dye.

📚 Contents

Bunny is a cute and cuddly robot companion that players can use to assist them in battles. Its large floppy ears and glowing eyes make it an adorable addition to any player's team, but don't let its cuteness fool you - this bunny is a fierce warrior!

Bunny 2.0 is a more advanced version of the robot-type bunny, with improved abilities and a sleeker design. This bunny has been upgraded with state-of-the-art technology, making it faster, stronger, and more intelligent than its predecessor. If you're looking for a robot companion that can help you take on even the toughest challenges, Bunny 2.0 is a perfect choice.

Dragon are Draconic in nature, these large winged robots are fierce combatants. Dragon bots can rake enemies with their sharp talons and bludgeon them with their spiked tails. Dragon robots make ideal frontline warriors.

Honey is a unique and versatile robot companion that can assist players in various ways, providing both offensive and defensive capabilities. This robot is designed to resemble a beehive, with hexagonal panels covering its metal body. Its head is shaped like a honeycomb, and its eyes are a vivid shade of amber.

Kitsune inspired by Japanese folklore, the Kitsune robot has fluffy fox ears and multiple flowing tails. These nimble robots are incredibly agile and quick, able to dash rapidly across the battlefield.

Neko  cute and cat-like, the neko robots have large fuzzy ears, whiskers, and a long tail. Their feline grace and reflexes enable them to stealthily sneak up on foes.

Vanilla is a friendly and helpful robot companion that is perfect for casual players who are just starting out on their adventure. It has a smiley face on its top, and its eyes are a bright shade of blue. The robot-type vanilla is equipped with a variety of useful features that make it a great companion for players who are new to the game.

💫 Robots

📖 Recipes

💡 FAQ

Q: Support for older versions of Minecraft?
A: So far I only plan to update up to 1.16.5, if there is a particular version you want, just say, when I got the time I will update.

Q: Will there be other types of robot girls like the MCPE Addon?
A: Did I got them all? Well new ones is... let's work on ones we got for now...

Q: How long will it take for an update to come out?
A: Hard to say, it can take days, weeks or months, I do this as hobby, but I won't stop any time soon because I use this to practise java coding.

Q: Will the mod be the same has its original?
A: Well that's the plan so far, all the features the original has is planned to be recreated in the future, plus some more feature down the line.

🏆 Credits

Original: LovelyRobot | lilacx02
Addon: LovelyRobotsPE | D Flog Flag & VirtualBlack8
